$schema: Copy to assessment.config.json and edit. Never commit the real file.

publish.comment: Set to your deployed URL (e.g. https://claude-mastery.vercel.app) so the Slack message links somewhere useful.

scoring.comment: includePluginSkillsAsPersonal: if true, plugin-provided agents/commands count toward Automation. Default false — Boris's rule is about what YOU built. includeTranscripts: opt-in to behavioral signals derived from ~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl. Aggregates only — never raw prompts. Default false; pass --include-transcripts to override per-run.

claudeMd.comment: Audited deterministically each morning. Report-only — never edits CLAUDE.md. Add a target per repo you want tracked.
